name: It's an Order! Do Not Defy Me!!!

issues.description: Main effect is completely wrong. Text says 'will not become active in your opponent's next Refresh Phase' (a prevention/lock effect), not Rest. This requires a custom lock/prevention mechanic, not Rest action. Rest action incorrectly applies immediate state change instead of preventing future activation.
Missing condition check for 'has 2 or more DON!! cards given'. The action lacks the HasAttachedDon condition with minAmount:2.
Counter effect targets 'ChooseOwnCharacter' but should specify '[Krieg]' type requirement. Target scope should include type filter or use ChooseOwnCardWithType.

suggestedDsl.effectText:
[Main] Up to 1 of your opponent's rested Characters with a cost of 8 or less that has 2 or more DON!! cards given will not become active in your opponent's next Refresh Phase.
[Counter] Up to 1 of your [Krieg] cards gains +4000 power during this battle.
